systems.name: Nurse Call System
systems.description: Clinical communication platforms that connect patients, nurses, and care teams across wards and critical care units. Austco systems go beyond button-and-light setups — supporting priority routing, mobile integrations, audit trails, and infection-control compliant call points with anti-bacterial silicone components.

systems.name: Public Address System
systems.description: Malaysia-designed PA and background music systems from conventional zone paging to full Ethernet/IP architectures. Amperes IP PA connects buildings over LAN with centralised controllers, music servers, PoE speakers, and PMX III management software — ideal for malls, campuses, airports, and hospitality venues.

systems.name: Audio & Video Intercom System
systems.description: IP-based audio and video intercom for multi-tenant residential, commercial, and institutional entrances. Aiphone IX Series supports PoE tenant stations, mobile app integration, elevator recall, and full-duplex HD video — deployed globally since 1948 with UL-certified hardware.

systems.name: Lighting Control System
systems.description: Precision dimming, scene control, and automated shade management for prestige hospitality, royal residences, and commercial landmarks. Lutron HomeWorks QSX supports panelised lighting, Ketra full-spectrum fixtures, and designer keypads — while RadioRA 3 delivers professional wireless control for retrofit projects.

systems.name: SMATV System
systems.description: Professional headend platforms for satellite and terrestrial TV distribution across residential towers and hospitality estates. Fagor Flow (formerly Ikusi Flow) is a modular smart headend supporting DVB-S/S2/T/T2/C inputs, IPTV output, hospitality DRM (Samsung LYNK, Philips VSecure, LG Pro:Idiom), and centralised Device Manager control.

systems.name: Master Clock System
systems.description: Synchronised time distribution for hospitals, schools, and commercial campuses. Bodet Time master clocks and time servers retrieve UTC from GPS/Galileo/DCF signals and distribute accurate time to analogue/digital clock networks, IT equipment, and PA systems — with French manufacturing heritage since 1868.

distributors.name: Austco
distributors.description: Global leader in nurse call and clinical workflow communications. Austco Tacera is the flagship IP platform; Medicom delivers proven reliability at scale across 800+ sites worldwide.

products.name: Tacera

products.name: Overdoor Lights
products.description: Corridor indication for staff presence and call priority.

distributors.name: Amperes
distributors.description: ISO 9001:2015 certified Malaysian manufacturer of PA, voice alarm, and BGM systems. Designed and engineered in Puchong, Selangor with conventional and IP product lines.

products.name: iPX5101
products.description: Central LAN controller managing up to 254 IP audio clients.

products.name: iPX5200
products.description: Streams BGM from 4 analogue inputs over multicast IP.

products.name: iPX5155

products.name: PMX III
products.description: Scheduling, monitoring, and PC-based paging control.

products.name: MX2222
products.description: Analogue zone mixer for up to 12-zone installations.

distributors.description: World leader in intercom and entry security. Hyper Advance has distributed Aiphone in Malaysia for residential towers, embassies, hospitals, and commercial complexes.

products.description: WiFi-enabled 7" touchscreen with mobile app support.

distributors.name: AJB
distributors.description: Leading Chinese building intercom brand with iF Design Award recognition. AJB IP systems serve condominiums across Southeast Asia with cloud app connectivity and multi-tenant scalability.

products.name: AJB-IM15C
products.description: Video door phone indoor station for IP intercom networks.

products.description: HD video entrance with night vision and door release.

products.name: AJB Cloud App
products.description: Remote video calling, unlock, and access monitoring.

products.name: Multi-Tenant Controller
products.description: Manages hundreds of units in large residential developments.

distributors.name: Lutron
distributors.description: World's foremost lighting control manufacturer. Hyper Advance deploys Lutron across royal residences, 5-star hotels, and convention centres requiring scene programming, shade automation, and Ketra-quality light.

products.name: HomeWorks QSX
products.description: Panelised and RF lighting for estates up to 10,000 zones.

products.name: RadioRA 3

products.name: Sivoia QS
products.description: Automated roller shades with precise sun-tracking.

products.name: Alisse Keypad

distributors.name: Fagor
distributors.description: Fagor SMATV systems distribute satellite and terrestrial TV signals across hotels, apartments, and commercial developments. The range also carries forward the engineering legacy of Ikusi — an established name in professional TV distribution — following its integration under the Fagor Group, combining proven expertise with expanded product support under one brand.

distributors.description: European leader in time measurement and management. Bodet Time designs and manufactures master clocks, time servers, and synchronised clock networks in France for hospitals, schools, and industry.

products.description: Automated bells, alerts, and pre-recorded announcements.

systemsWeOffer.name: Nurse Call system
systemsWeOffer.description: A Nurse Call System enables patients to quickly request assistance from healthcare staff in hospitals, clinics, and nursing homes. It improves patient safety, enhances communication, and ensures faster response times from caregivers.

systemsWeOffer.name: Intercom
systemsWeOffer.description: An Intercom System provides instant voice and video communication between different areas of a building. Commonly used in residential, commercial, healthcare, and industrial facilities, it enhances security, visitor management, and operational efficiency.

systemsWeOffer.name: Public address
systemsWeOffer.description: A Public Address (PA) System is used to broadcast announcements, emergency messages, and background audio across a facility. Commonly installed in commercial buildings, schools, hospitals, and industrial sites, it ensures clear communication and improves safety and operational efficiency.

systemsWeOffer.name: SMATV
systemsWeOffer.description: A Satellite Master Antenna Television (SMATV) System distributes satellite and terrestrial TV signals from a central antenna to multiple users within a building or facility. Commonly used in hotels, apartments, hospitals, and commercial developments, it provides a cost-effective and reliable television distribution solution.

systemsWeOffer.name: Lighting control
systemsWeOffer.description: A Lighting Control System manages and automates lighting in buildings to improve comfort, energy efficiency, and convenience. It is commonly used in commercial buildings, hotels, offices, and smart homes to enable centralized, scheduled, or sensor-based lighting control.

systemsWeOffer.name: Fireman intercom
systemsWeOffer.description: A Fireman Intercom System provides reliable two-way communication between fire command centers and designated areas during emergencies. Commonly installed in high-rise buildings, it ensures clear coordination for firefighting operations and improves overall emergency response and safety.

systemsWeOffer.name: Digital call
systemsWeOffer.description: A Digital Call System enables fast and reliable communication for service requests and assistance within facilities. Commonly used in hospitals, hotels, and care homes, it improves response efficiency, workflow coordination, and service quality.

systemsWeOffer.name: Master clock
systemsWeOffer.description: A Master Clock System synchronizes and controls time across all clocks and time-based devices in a building or facility. Commonly used in schools, hospitals, factories, and transport hubs, it ensures accurate, unified timing for operations and scheduling.

systemsWeOffer.name: Image speak through
systemsWeOffer.description: A Speak-Through System is a two-way communication system installed between MRI/X-ray rooms and control rooms, allowing clear communication between patients and radiology staff without entering the restricted area. It ensures safety, reduces radiation exposure, and allows technicians to guide patients during scans or procedures.

systemsWeOffer.name: Conference
systemsWeOffer.description: A Conference System provides clear audio (and sometimes video) communication for meetings and discussions in boardrooms and meeting spaces. It is commonly used in corporate offices, hotels, and government facilities to improve collaboration, presentation quality, and meeting efficiency.

systemsWeOffer.name: Panic button
systemsWeOffer.description: A Panic Button System allows users to instantly trigger an emergency alert in situations of threat or distress. Commonly used in banks, retail stores, hospitals, and offices, it ensures fast security response and enhances personal safety.

systemsWeOffer.name: Intruder alarm
systemsWeOffer.description: An Intruder Alarm System detects unauthorized entry into a building using sensors on doors, windows, and motion detection. Commonly used in homes, offices, and commercial facilities, it provides early warning, deters break-ins, and enhances overall security.

systemsWeOffer.name: Card Access
systemsWeOffer.brands: ZKTECO, Entrypass, microengine, Bosch, Dahua, HIKVision
systemsWeOffer.description: A Card Access System controls entry to buildings or restricted areas using RFID or smart cards. Commonly used in offices, hospitals, and commercial buildings, it enhances security, monitors movement, and allows controlled access to authorized users only.

systemsWeOffer.name: CCTV
systemsWeOffer.description: A CCTV (Closed-Circuit Television) System is used for real-time monitoring and recording of activities within a building or area. Commonly installed in commercial, residential, and industrial sites, it enhances security, supports surveillance, and helps deter and investigate incidents.

systemsWeOffer.name: Audio visual system
systemsWeOffer.description: An Audio Visual (AV) System integrates sound and visual technologies for presentations, communication, and entertainment. Commonly used in meeting rooms, auditoriums, and commercial spaces, it enhances engagement, collaboration, and information delivery.

systemsWeOffer.name: OT Tie Line
systemsWeOffer.description: An OT (Operating Theatre) Tie Line System enables secure live video and audio transmission from operating theatres to seminar or teaching rooms. It is commonly used in hospitals and medical training institutions to support real-time surgical education, allowing students and staff to observe procedures without entering the sterile environment.

serviceCapabilities.title: Design
serviceCapabilities.description: Design proposals for ELV systems, including layout plans and schematic drawings aligned to your project requirements.

serviceCapabilities.title: Supply
serviceCapabilities.description: A wide range of ELV products and systems from authorised brands and established partners.

serviceCapabilities.title: Installation
serviceCapabilities.description: Capability to install virtually all types of ELV systems across commercial, residential, healthcare, and hospitality sites.

serviceCapabilities.title: Maintenance
serviceCapabilities.description: Comprehensive and non-comprehensive maintenance programmes to keep every ELV system running smoothly.

serviceCapabilities.title: Programming
serviceCapabilities.description: System programming configured to end-user needs, operational preferences, and site-specific workflows.

serviceCapabilities.title: Testing & Commissioning
serviceCapabilities.description: Structured testing, commissioning, and handover to ensure systems are ready for operational use.

serviceCapabilities.title: Training
serviceCapabilities.description: User training on system operation, routine care, and best practices for long-term reliability.

haMeditech.title: HA Meditech Sdn Bhd
haMeditech.description: Sister company of Hyper Advance specialising solely in IPS systems for hospitals. Sole distributor of Esa Grimma — a trusted German brand. Led by an experienced engineer with more than 30 years in the field. Established in 2011.

systems.name: Isolated Power Supply (IPS)
systems.description: Medical-grade isolated power systems for operating theatres, critical care zones, and hospital infrastructure.
